events.text: Goal!  Germany 0, Sweden 1. Ola Toivonen (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Viktor Claesson with a through ball.
Goal!  Germany 1, Sweden 1. Marco Reus (Germany) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mario Gomez.
Albin Ekdal (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jérôme Boateng (Germany) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second yellow card to Jérôme Boateng (Germany) for a bad foul.
Goal!  Germany 2, Sweden 1. Toni Kroos (Germany) from a free kick with a right footed shot to the top right corner.
Sebastian Larsson (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
